case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. LIBERTY DEVELOPMENT GROUP LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT LIBERTY DEVELOPMENT GROUP LLC AND ITS SUCCESSORS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT LIBERTY DEVELOPMENT GROUP LLC AND ITS SUCCESSORS
